description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular electronic device with a two-tone color scheme, featuring a red top and sides and a khaki green front and back panel. The top surface is adorned with a series of physical control buttons and a prominent rotary knob, suggesting it is designed for user interaction. The front and back panels are flat and likely serve as speaker grilles or covers, with the front panel being the primary interface. The device's small size and portable form factor indicate it is meant to be easily moved and used in various urban environments, such as parks, sidewalks, or garages. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metallic components for durability and tactile feedback. Its design is minimalistic, with no visible display screen, emphasizing tactile controls over digital interfaces.
description: A small, rectangular, two-tone electronic device with physical buttons and a rotary knob on top, likely a portable speaker or similar gadget. The object features a red and khaki color scheme and a compact, durable build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the khaki green panel and the top-mounted control buttons and rotary knob.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim red side panel and the protruding rotary knob on the top.
description_view_2: Back view with a flat khaki green panel and a partial view of the top controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red side panel and the row of control buttons on the top.
